chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/342)
text: إِنَّ ابْنِي عَلِيّاً أَكْبَرُ وُلْدِي وَ أَبَرُّهُمْ عِنْدِي وَ أَحَبُّهُمْ إِلَيَّ وَ هُوَ يَنْظُرُ مَعِي فِي الْجَفْرِ وَ لَمْ يَنْظُرْ فِيهِ إِلَّا نَبِيٌّ أَوْ وَصِيُّ نَبِيٍّ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Muawiya Bin Hukeym, from Nuaym Al Qabousy,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> son<sup>asws</sup> Ali<sup>asws</sup> is the eldest of my<sup>asws</sup> children, and the more righteous of them in my<sup>asws</sup> presence, and the most beloved of them to me<sup>asws</sup>, and he<sup>asws</sup> looks into Al-Jaf’r with me<sup>asws</sup>, and none looks into it except for a Prophet<sup>as</sup> or a successor<sup>as</sup> of a Prophet<sup>as</sup>’.
en.sarwar: 2. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Mu‘awiya ibn Hakim from Nu‘aym al-Qabusi from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) who has said the following. “My son, Ali is the eldest of my sons and the most virtuous among them to me and the most beloved of them to me. He looks into the Jafr (a secret source of knowledge) with me. No one looks into it except a prophet or the executor of the will of a prophet.”
